caption: The video features an older man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a blue shirt adorned with bird patterns and colorful stripes across the chest. He stands behind a podium labeled "Kellogg-Hubbard Library," addressing an audience. The man appears to be speaking into a microphone, gesturing slightly with his hands as he talks. The setting is indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background. The atmosphere suggests a formal event or presentation, possibly a lecture or community gathering. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the source or affiliation of the video.
